question: 查询价格高于1000元的商品名称、类别和价格。
gold_sqlplus:
FROM products p
| WHERE p.price > 1000
| SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC
pred_sqlplus:
FROM products p
| WHERE p.price > 1000
| SELECT p.product_name, p.category, p.price
| ORDER p.product_name ASC

question: 查询2025年3月之后的已支付订单编号和日期。
gold_sqlplus:
FROM orders o
| WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-03-01'
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date
| ORDER o.order_date ASC
pred_sqlplus:
FROM orders o
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| WHERE o.order_date >= '2025-04-01'
| SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date
| ORDER o.order_date ASC

question: 查询单价低于200元的订单明细编号、商品编号和数量。
gold_sqlplus:
FROM order_items oi
| WHERE oi.unit_price < 200
| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity
| ORDER oi.quantity DESC
pred_sqlplus:
FROM order_items oi
| WHERE oi.unit_price < 200
| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity
| ORDER oi.item_id ASC

question: 查询价格最高的两个商品。
gold_sqlplus:
FROM products p
| SELECT p.product_name, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC
| LIMIT 2
pred_sqlplus:
FROM products p
| SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name, p.price
| ORDER p.price DESC, p.product_id ASC
| LIMIT 2

question: 统计每个客户的已支付订单数。

pred: orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id AND o.status = 'paid'

gold_sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_orders
| ORDER paid_orders DESC
pred_sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id AND o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_id, c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_id, c.customer_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS paid_order_count

question: 查询每个客户等级的客户数量。
gold_sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| GROUP c.level
| AGG c.level, COUNT(*) AS customer_count
| ORDER customer_count DESC
pred_sqlplus:
FROM customers c
| GROUP c.level
| AGG c.level, COUNT(c.customer_id) AS customer_count
| ORDER c.level ASC

question: 查询每个订单的订单金额，只统计已支付订单。
gold_sqlplus:
FROM orders o
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP o.order_id
| AGG o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount
| ORDER order_amount DESC
pred_sqlplus:
FROM orders o
| JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP o.order_id
| AGG o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount

question: 查询家具类商品的已支付销售数量。
gold_sqlplus:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE p.category = 'furniture'
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP p.category
| AGG p.category, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity
pred_sqlplus:
FROM products p
| JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid' AND p.category = 'furniture'
| AGG SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity

question: 查询每个客户购买的不同商品种类数。
查询已支付订单中单项金额最高的三条明细。

differences.gold: oi.item_id, p.product_name, oi.quantity * oi.unit_price AS item_amount
differences.pred: oi.item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS line_amount

gold_sqlplus:
FROM order_items oi
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| SELECT oi.item_id, p.product_name, oi.quantity * oi.unit_price AS item_amount
| ORDER item_amount DESC
| LIMIT 3
pred_sqlplus:
FROM order_items oi
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid' AND oi.quantity = 1
| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS line_amount
| ORDER line_amount DESC
| LIMIT 3
